description_long: This emergency worker is depicted as a humanoid figure dressed in a full-body, deep red uniform with a hood that covers the head entirely. The face is concealed by a black mask featuring a single white circle in the center, giving a mysterious and anonymous appearance. The uniform includes black gloves, black boots, and a black utility belt around the waist, with subtle seam and pocket details on the chest and legs. The suit appears to be made of a matte, fabric-like material, while the mask, gloves, and boots are likely constructed from a harder, synthetic material. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with no visible insignia, reflective elements, or additional equipment. The figure's proportions and attire suggest a role in security, enforcement, or emergency response within an urban environment.
description: A humanoid emergency worker in a red hooded uniform with a black mask featuring a white circle, black gloves, boots, and a utility belt. The design is sleek, minimal, and anonymous, with no visible insignia or equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red hooded suit, black gloves and boots, utility belt, and the black mask with a white circle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the smooth contour of the suit, and the protruding mask.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back of the hooded suit, the belt, and the absence of any markings or equipment.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the hood, mask, and the fitted nature of the suit.
attribute_uniform_type: A full-body, deep red hooded jumpsuit made of matte fabric, featuring a black utility belt, black gloves, and black boots. The suit is seamless with minimalistic pocket and seam details, and the head is covered by a matching hood.
attribute_helmet_or_headgear: A deep red hood covering the head, paired with a black, featureless mask displaying a single white circle at the center. The mask appears to be made of a hard synthetic material.
